channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Police were searching for teens behind San Diego mosque shooting before the bloodshed began
item.description: Before the first shot rang out at a San Diego mosque in a deadly shooting, police were already scrambling to find two teenagers who would ultimately be responsible.

item.title: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries as Trump’s endorsement is put to the test
Busiest US commuter rail system to resume operations as deal reached to end strike
